name: gridpoint
description: Configuration keywords for 'plot item create gridpoint'. Controls nodal value rendering, coloring, labels, and legends for FLAC gridpoints.

basic_keywords.description: Show the gridpoint item in the plot.
Show a legend for color-mapped gridpoint values.

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Color gridpoints by displacement, velocity, force, pore pressure, temperature, group, or extra variables.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create gridpoint active on color-by vector-attribute "displacement" color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Continuous displacement color map at gridpoints.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create gridpoint active on color-by text-attribute "group" 'Any' color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true legend active on
